The difference between the maximum and m: 最大值和最低值之间的差额
Interquartile Range: Q3 − Q1, the spread: 孔径范围: Q3 - Q1, 数据中50%的分布
A measure of how far data values typical: 衡量数据值通常与平均值之间的距离
The square of the standard deviation: σ²: 标准差的平方: +2 = (x- x = x) 2 / n
Which measure of spread is resistant to: 哪种量的传播能抵挡离子的偏差呢?
Data values are clustered close to the m: 数据值分组接近平均值
Data values are spread far from the mean: 数据值的分布距离平均值很远
